a child in her care 
45 = Parent of employee 
46 = Widow/widower of RR employee 
83 = Widow of pensioner with a child in her care 
86 = Widow/widower of RR pensioner 

COMMENT: RRB definitions — 

Employee: a Medicare beneficiary who is still working or a worker who died before retirement 

Annuitant: a person who retired under the railroad retirement act on or after 03/01/37 

Pensioner: a person who retired prior to 03/01/37 and was included in the railroad retirement act
